revision.text:
{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}}|1|}}|}}<noinclude>''Usage:'' <nowiki>{{both|s1|s2}}</nowiki>
Returns '''1''' if both s1 and s2 are non-empty; otherwise returns the empty string.

{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}}|1|}}|}}<noinclude>''Usage:'' <nowiki>{{both|s1|s2}}</nowiki>
Returns '''1''' if both s1 and s2 are non-empty; otherwise returns the empty string.</noinclude>

A0{{{0|}}}A1{{{1|}}}A{{{2|}}}A{{{3|}}}A{{{4|}}}B
<!--{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}}|1|}}|}}<noinclude>''Usage:'' <nowiki>{{both|s1|s2}}</nowiki>
Returns '''1''' if both s1 and s2 are non-empty; otherwise returns the empty string.</noinclude>

{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|}}|}}<noinclude>''Usage:'' <nowiki>{{both|s1|s2}}</nowiki>
Returns '''1''' if both s1 and s2 are non-empty; otherwise returns the empty string.</noinclude>

{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|}}|}}<noinclude>''Usage:'' <nowiki>{{both|string1|string2}}</nowiki>
Produces '''1''' (equivalent to a true condition) if both ''string1'' and ''string2'' are non-empty; otherwise produces the empty string (false condition).
[[Category:Boolean, register, and condition testing templates]]</noinclude>

{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|}}|}}<noinclude>''Usage:'' <nowiki>{{both|string1|string2}}</nowiki>
Produces '''1''' (equivalent to a true condition) if both ''string1'' and ''string2'' are non-empty; otherwise produces the empty string (false condition).
See also: [[Template:Allof]]
[[Category:Boolean, register, and condition testing templates]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected Template:Both: high-use template; vandalism target [edit=sysop:move=sysop]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|}}|}}<noinclude>''Usage:'' <nowiki>{{both|string1|string2}}</nowiki>
Produces '''1''' (equivalent to a true condition) if both ''string1'' and ''string2'' are non-empty; otherwise produces the empty string (false condition).
See also: [[Template:Allof]]
[[Category:Boolean, register, and condition testing templates]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: {{pp-template}}
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|}}|}}<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}''Usage:'' <nowiki>{{both|string1|string2}}</nowiki>
Produces '''1''' (equivalent to a true condition) if both ''string1'' and ''string2'' are non-empty; otherwise produces the empty string (false condition).
See also: [[Template:Allof]]
[[Category:Boolean, register, and condition testing templates]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: remove non-existing link
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|}}|}}<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}''Usage:'' <nowiki>{{both|string1|string2}}</nowiki>
Produces '''1''' (equivalent to a true condition) if both ''string1'' and ''string2'' are non-empty; otherwise produces the empty string (false condition).
[[Category:Boolean, register, and condition testing templates]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: moved to [[Template:Both/doc]]
remove {{pp-template}}
Changed protection level of Template:Both: Enable access by template editors ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
make subst'able
「[[Template:Both]]」の保護レベルを変更しました: [[Wikipedia:保護の方針#半永久的な保護]]「[[Wikipedia:影響が特に大きいテンプレート|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]」に基づき無期限拡張半保護 ([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
per edit request on talk page - TfD notice
Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1227896247|1227896247]] by [[Special:Contributions/Paine Ellsworth|Paine Ellsworth]] ([[User talk:Paine Ellsworth|talk]]) might be breaking things
adding notice per talk
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2024 June 8#Template:Both]] closed as keep ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.15|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Both]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2024 June 8#Template:Both]] closed as keep ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.15|XFDcloser]])

1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 20 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Both]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Both here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Both for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#if:{{{1|}}}|{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#if:{{{2|}}}|1}}}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>
